categories.name: Getting Started
categories.description: Install Jetonomy, run the setup wizard, and launch your WordPress forum or Q&A community in minutes.

categories.name: Spaces & Categories
categories.description: Organize your community into categories and Forum, Q&A, Ideas, Show & Tell, or Social Feed spaces with membership and join controls.

categories.name: Discussions & Topics
categories.description: Create topics, post threaded replies, upvote and downvote, accept answers, and save drafts in your community.

categories.name: Search & Discovery
categories.description: Help members find discussions with full-text search, cross-space tags, and filters.

categories.name: Moderation & Trust
categories.description: Keep your community safe with trust levels 0 to 5, content flagging, a moderation queue, anti-spam, and member banning.

categories.name: Notifications & Email
categories.description: Bring members back with in-app notifications, email alerts, and Pro private messaging, digests, and web push.

categories.name: User Profiles & Leaderboard
categories.description: Member profiles, reputation scores, online status, and a leaderboard that ranks your top contributors.

categories.name: Pro Features
categories.description: Jetonomy Pro extensions: private messaging, polls, reactions, custom badges, advanced moderation, analytics, webhooks, and AI.

categories.name: Integrations
categories.description: Gate spaces with MemberPress, Paid Memberships Pro, WooCommerce, LearnDash, and Tutor LMS, and connect BuddyPress and FluentCommunity.

categories.name: Admin Settings
categories.description: Configure permissions, email, appearance, SEO, anti-spam, access control, and the activity log from wp-admin.

categories.name: Migration
categories.description: Import your existing forum from bbPress or wpForo without losing topics, replies, or members.

categories.name: Why Jetonomy
categories.description: How Jetonomy compares to bbPress and wpForo, and how it scales to communities with thousands of topics.

categories.name: Developer Guide
categories.description: Extend Jetonomy with the REST API, hooks, WP-CLI, blocks, shortcodes, and template overrides.
